completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: web (React 19.2.4 PWA + TS 5.9.3 + Vite 7.3.1 + Supabase 2.99.0 + Zustand 5.0.11 + Tailwind 4.2.1 + Zod 4.3.6)
Found 99 existing doc files in docs/, 197 source files in src/ (45,011 lines), 83 test files in tests/, 23 SQL migrations, 18 CI workflows, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md
Tech stack: React 19.2.4, TS 5.9.3, Vite 7.3.1, Zustand 5.0.11, Supabase 2.99.0, Tailwind 4.2.1, Framer Motion 12.35.2, Zod 4.3.6, Sentry 10.42.0, Vitest 4.0.17, Playwright 1.58.2

4 parallel agents + 1 verification agent completed exhaustive scan: Agent A (project-overview 9 files + architecture 20 files + source-tree 8 files, key fixes: __APP_STORE__, SW registration, component hierarchy), Agent B (api-reference 16 files + data-models 11 files, all from actual source), Agent C (component-inventory 9 files + state-management 12 files, restructured to per-slice), Agent D (development-guide 15 files + performance 2 files, corrected migrations 23, all 18 CI workflows), Verification Agent (patched 4 scripture mid-scan changes into relevant docs)

Master index.md rewritten: corrected to 103 files ~14,800 lines, updated all version numbers, fixed source tree references (removed old 04-06, added new 04-07), restructured state management section to per-slice format, updated migration count to 23
Validation: No '(To be generated)' markers found. No TBD/TODO/Pending placeholder markers found. Checklist reviewed against all sections.

Finalized. 103 markdown files, ~14,800 lines across 10 sections. Key corrections from prior scan: Supabase 2.97.0->2.99.0, Framer Motion 12.34.3->12.35.2, Sentry 10.39.0->10.42.0, Tailwind 4.1.17->4.2.1, Lucide 0.577.0, migration count 21->23, state management restructured to per-slice files, source tree files replaced with new analysis, scripture mid-scan changes verified and patched.

findings.project_classification: monolith, 1 part, React 19 + TypeScript 5.9 + Vite 7.3 + Supabase
